name: newsletter/composer
description: Compose and manage the RSoW and Better Button newsletters from Obsidian notes.

interface.shortDescription: Compose RSoW and Better Button newsletters from Obsidian notes
interface.longDescription: Prepare, organize, and compose newsletter issues for Rekni si o web and Better Button using source notes, templates, and issue folders in an Obsidian vault.
